title: Midnight Couscous Midnightly
description: A tangy and silky whole30-friendly Syrian dish featuring poached couscous that caters to midnight cravings.

ingredients.name: 1 cup gluten-free couscous
ingredients.notes: Use a 2:1 water to couscous ratio for poaching.

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Rinse the couscous and measure out 1 cup. Add 1/4 cup of water or bone broth, cover with a paper towel, and microwave for about 2 minutes.
While the couscous is microwaving, mix together the lemon juice, salt, honey, and dried mint in a small saucepan.

When the microwave is done, pour the couscous into a medium-sized bowl. Pour the lemon mixture over the couscous, then carefully place the bowl on top of a smaller plate to catch any splashes during poaching.
Cover with aluminum foil and bake for 20 minutes in the preheated oven. After baking, remove from oven and let sit for about 5 minutes before serving.
